find-docs.description: Retrieves up-to-date documentation, API references, and code examples for any library or framework via Context7 CLI (ctx7)

find-skills.description: Discover and install agent skills from community registries via npx skills CLI

frontend-design.description: Crea interfaces frontend distintivas y de calidad de producción (componentes, páginas, dashboards React/HTML/CSS); evita la estética genérica de IA

vercel-react-best-practices.description: Guías de optimización de rendimiento React/Next.js de Vercel Engineering; usar al escribir, revisar o refactorizar código React para patrones de rendimiento óptimos

caveman.description: Ultra-compressed output mode (~75% fewer tokens). Makes agent talk like caveman while keeping full technical accuracy. Levels: lite, full (default), ultra, wenyan.
caveman.securityAssessment: Safe · JS utility skill · read-only output transformation

backprop.description: Bug → spec protocol. When tests fail or bugs surface, traces root cause, adds §B entry to spec, promotes recurring patterns to §V invariants in CHECKPOINTS.md. Closes the fix-and-forget gap.
backprop.securityAssessment: Safe · pure spec-editing protocol · no external calls

sp-writing-plans.description: Genera plan de implementación detallado (TDD, bite-sized tasks, file structure, interfaces) a partir de un spec aprobado. Guardado en docs/superpowers/plans/. Invocar entre spec_ready aprobado y lanzar implementer.
sp-writing-plans.securityAssessment: Safe · skill de planificación · sin llamadas externas

sp-subagent.description: Subagent-driven development: despacha un implementer subagente por tarea independiente, review tras cada uno, review final del branch. Usar para features con ≥3 tareas independientes.
sp-subagent.securityAssessment: Safe · skill de orquestación · sin llamadas externas

sp-verify.description: Verificación antes de declarar completitud. Requiere evidencia fresca (./verify.ps1 output) antes de emitir APPROVED o cualquier claim de éxito. Evidence before assertions.
sp-verify.securityAssessment: Safe · skill de verificación · sin llamadas externas

graphify.description: Convierte el codebase en un knowledge graph consultable (tree-sitter + GraphRAG). Genera graph.html (visual), GRAPH_REPORT.md (resumen) y graph.json (queryable). Callflow Mermaid con 'graphify export callflow-html'. Instalar con: uv tool install graphifyy && graphify install --project
graphify.securityAssessment: Safe · 68k stars · YC S26 · local-only graph generation
graphify.installNote: PyPI package is 'graphifyy' (double-y). CLI command remains 'graphify'. Run: uv tool install graphifyy && graphify install --project && graphify .
